base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of projectile_laser — a projectile (special_attack_proj) from 1987 contra. L (laser) — stretched blue beam, single-file hitscan. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
